claim: Devin can be integrated with Linear to automatically convert tagged tickets into pull requests with preview deployments and automated code reviews.
actionable: Tag Devin on a Linear ticket; the agent will create a working PR with a preview deployment and automatically run code review via Devin Review.
source_title: How Engineering Teams Use Devin Cloud Agents to Turn Linear Tickets Into Pull Requests

claim: Devin automatically moves Linear tickets to 'In Review' status after creating a pull request with Devin Review configured.
actionable: Configure Devin Review in your Linear-Devin integration; ticket status will update automatically as the workflow progresses.
source_title: How Engineering Teams Use Devin Cloud Agents to Turn Linear Tickets Into Pull Requests
